ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), ISCHANGED(Status__c), CASE(TEXT(Status__c), "New", 1, "Open", 2, "Working", 3, "Under Review", 4, "Qualified", 5, "Retainer Agreement Sent", 6, "Retainer Agreement Signed", 7, "Turned Down", 8, "Referred Out", 8, "Converted", 8, 0 ) < CASE(TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Status__c)), "New", 1, "Open", 2, "Working", 3, "Under Review", 4, "Qualified", 5, "Retainer Agreement Sent", 6, "Retainer Agreement Signed", 7, "Turned Down", 8, "Referred Out", 8, "Converted", 8, 0 ) )
